name: Animation Vocabulary
description: Reverse-lookup glossary that turns a vague motion description into the exact term — so you can prompt designers or agents with the right words.

install.cursor: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill animation-vocabulary -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill animation-vocabulary -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill animation-vocabulary -a codex -g -y
